message.content:
Create FrmToolPos.vb and FrmToolPos.Designer.vb for the ST40 project by copying from S50.

S50 source files (read these first):
- C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50\FrmToolPos.vb
- C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50\FrmToolPos.Designer.vb

ST40 target:
- C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmToolPos.vb
- C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmToolPos.Designer.vb

Copy the files exactly as they are from S50. The RootNamespace is the same (S50), so no namespace changes needed. The SpecNames should stay the same:
"HGT_LH_KY", "HGT_LH_QY", "HGT_RH_KY", "HGT_RH_QY", "NHGT_LH_KY", "NHGT_LH_QY", "NHGT_RH_KY", "NHGT_RH_QY"

The INI section prefix should be "POS_" (for position/image) - same as S50.

Write these as new files. Code comments in English.

content.content:
1→Public Class FrmToolPos
     2→
     3→    Private ReadOnly SpecNames As String() = {
     4→        "HGT_LH_KY", "HGT_LH_QY", "HGT_RH_KY", "HGT_RH_QY",
     5→        "NHGT_LH_KY", "NHGT_LH_QY", "NHGT_RH_KY", "NHGT_RH_QY"
     6→    }
     7→
     8→    Private currentImage As Image = Nothing
     9→    Private txtX(4) As TextBox
    10→    Private txtY(4) As TextBox
    11→    Private rdoP(4) As RadioButton
    12→
    13→    Public Sub New()
    14→        InitializeComponent()
    15→    End Sub
    16→
    17→    Private Sub FrmToolPos_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
    18→        ' TextBox/RadioButton 배열 먼저 연결 (SelectedIndex 설정 전에 해야 함)
    19→        txtX(0) = txtP1X : txtY(0) = txtP1Y : rdoP(0) = rdoP1
    20→        txtX(1) = txtP2X : txtY(1) = txtP2Y : rdoP(1) = rdoP2
    21→        txtX(2) = txtP3X : txtY(2) = txtP3Y : rdoP(2) = rdoP3
    22→        txtX(3) = txtP4X : txtY(3) = txtP4Y : rdoP(3) = rdoP4
    23→        txtX(4) = txtP5X : txtY(4) = txtP5Y : rdoP(4) = rdoP5
    24→        rdoP1.Checked = True
    25→
    26→        For Each s As String In SpecNames
    27→            cboSpec.Items.Add(s)
    28→        Next
    29→        cboSpec.SelectedIndex = 0
    30→    End Sub
    31→
    32→    Private Sub cboSpec_SelectedIndexChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles cboSpec.SelectedIndexChanged
    33→        LoadSpec()
    34→    End Sub
    35→
    36→    Private Sub LoadSpec()
    37→        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
    38→        Dim section As String = "POS_" & SpecNames(cboSpec.SelectedIndex)
    39→
    40→        ' 이미지 로드
    41→        Dim imgPath As String = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "ImagePath", "")
    42→        txtImagePath.Text = imgPath
    43→        SetImage(imgPath)
    44→
    45→        ' 좌표 로드
    46→        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
    47→            txtX(i).Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "X", "0")
    48→            txtY(i).Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "Y", "0")
    49→        Next
    50→
    51→        ' 원 크기
    52→        txtCircleSize.Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "CircleSize", "30")
    53→
    54→        picPreview.Invalidate()
    55→    End Sub
    56→
    57→    Private Sub SetImage(imgPath As String)
    58→        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
    59→            currentImage.Dispose()
    60→            currentImage = Nothing
    61→        End If
    62→        If System.IO.File.Exists(imgPath) Then
    63→            currentImage = Image.FromFile(imgPath)
    64→        End If
    65→    End Sub
    66→
    67→    Private Sub btnSelectImage_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSelectImage.Click
    68→        Using dlg As New OpenFileDialog()
    69→            dlg.Filter = "Image Files|*.bmp;*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.gif|All Files|*.*"
    70→            dlg.Title = "Select Image File"
    71→            If dlg.ShowDialog() = DialogResult.OK Then
    72→                txtImagePath.Text = dlg.FileName
    73→                SetImage(dlg.FileName)
    74→                picPreview.Invalidate()
    75→            End If
    76→        End Using
    77→    End Sub
    78→
    79→    ' 이미지 클릭 → 선택된 P 좌표 설정 후 다음 P로 이동
    80→    Private Sub picPreview_MouseClick(sender As Object, e As MouseEventArgs) Handles picPreview.MouseClick
    81→        If currentImage Is Nothing Then Return
    82→
    83→        ' picPreview 화면 좌표 → 이미지 원본 좌표 변환
    84→        Dim imgX As Integer = CInt(e.X * currentImage.Width / picPreview.Width)
    85→        Dim imgY As Integer = CInt(e.Y * currentImage.Height / picPreview.Height)
    86→
    87→        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
    88→            If rdoP(i).Checked Then
    89→                txtX(i).Text = imgX.ToString()
    90→                txtY(i).Text = imgY.ToString()
    91→                ' 다음 P로 자동 이동
    92→                If i < 4 Then rdoP(i + 1).Checked = True
    93→                Exit For
    94→            End If
    95→        Next
    96→
    97→        picPreview.Invalidate()
    98→    End Sub
    99→
   100→    Private Sub picPreview_Paint(sender As Object, e As PaintEventArgs) Handles picPreview.Paint
   101→        Dim g As Graphics = e.Graphics
   102→
   103→        ' 이미지 그리기 (StretchImage)
   104→        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
   105→            g.DrawImage(currentImage, picPreview.ClientRectangle)
   106→        End If
   107→
   108→        ' 원 크기 / 글자 크기 (비율 자동 추종)
   109→        Dim circleSize As Integer = 30
   110→        Integer.TryParse(txtCircleSize.Text, circleSize)
   111→        If circleSize < 10 Then circleSize = 10
   112→        Dim fontSize As Single = Math.Max(6, circleSize * 0.4F)
   113→
   114→        ' 이미지 원본 → 화면 스케일
   115→        Dim scaleX As Single = 1.0F
   116→        Dim scaleY As Single = 1.0F
   117→        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
   118→            scaleX = CSng(picPreview.Width) / currentImage.Width
   119→            scaleY = CSng(picPreview.Height) / currentImage.Height
   120→        End If
   121→
   122→        Using brushBlack As New SolidBrush(Color.Black)
   123→            Using brushWhite As New SolidBrush(Color.White)
   124→                Using penWhite As New Pen(Color.White, 1)
   125→                    Using fnt As New Font("Arial", fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
   126→                        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
   127→                            Dim px As Integer = 0
   128→                            Dim py As Integer = 0
   129→                            Integer.TryParse(txtX(i).Text, px)
   130→                            Integer.TryParse(txtY(i).Text, py)
   131→
   132→                            Dim sx As Integer = CInt(px * scaleX)
   133→                            Dim sy As Integer = CInt(py * scaleY)
   134→
   135→                            Dim rect As New Rectangle(sx - circleSize \ 2, sy - circleSize \ 2, circleSize, circleSize)
   136→                            g.FillEllipse(brushBlack, rect)
   137→                            g.DrawEllipse(penWhite, rect)
   138→
   139→                            Dim numStr As String = CStr(i + 1)
   140→                            Dim strSize As SizeF = g.MeasureString(numStr, fnt)
   141→                            g.DrawString(numStr, fnt, brushWhite,
   142→                    sx - strSize.Width / 2,
   143→                    sy - strSize.Height / 2)
   144→                        Next
   145→                    End Using
   146→                End Using
   147→            End Using
   148→        End Using
   149→    End Sub
   150→
   151→    Private Sub btnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSave.Click
   152→        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
   153→        Dim section As String = "POS_" & SpecNames(cboSpec.SelectedIndex)
   154→
   155→        iniFile.WriteValue(section, "ImagePath", txtImagePath.Text)
   156→        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
   157→            iniFile.WriteValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "X", txtX(i).Text)
   158→            iniFile.WriteValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "Y", txtY(i).Text)
   159→        Next
   160→        iniFile.WriteValue(section, "CircleSize", txtCircleSize.Text)
   161→
   162→        MessageBox.Show("Saved successfully.", "Info", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   163→    End Sub
   164→
   165→    Private Sub btnClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnClose.Click
   166→        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then currentImage.Dispose()
   167→        Me.Close()
   168→    End Sub
   169→
   170→    ' 좌표/원크기 변경 시 미리보기 실시간 갱신
   171→    Private Sub txtCoord_TextChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) _
   172→        Handles txtP1X.TextChanged, txtP1Y.TextChanged,
   173→                txtP2X.TextChanged, txtP2Y.TextChanged,
   174→                txtP3X.TextChanged, txtP3Y.TextChanged,
   175→                txtP4X.TextChanged, txtP4Y.TextChanged,
   176→                txtP5X.TextChanged, txtP5Y.TextChanged,
   177→                txtCircleSize.TextChanged
   178→        picPreview.Invalidate()
   179→    End Sub
   180→
   181→End Class
   182→

content.text: 디렉토리 확인 완료. FrmToolPos.resx는 이미 있으므로 .vb와 .Designer.vb만 생성하면 됩니다. S50 소스를 그대로 복사합니다.

input.content:
Public Class FrmToolPos

    Private ReadOnly SpecNames As String() = {
        "HGT_LH_KY", "HGT_LH_QY", "HGT_RH_KY", "HGT_RH_QY",
        "NHGT_LH_KY", "NHGT_LH_QY", "NHGT_RH_KY", "NHGT_RH_QY"
    }

    Private currentImage As Image = Nothing
    Private txtX(4) As TextBox
    Private txtY(4) As TextBox
    Private rdoP(4) As RadioButton

    Public Sub New()
        InitializeComponent()
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmToolPos_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        ' Link TextBox/RadioButton arrays (must be done before SelectedIndex is set)
        txtX(0) = txtP1X : txtY(0) = txtP1Y : rdoP(0) = rdoP1
        txtX(1) = txtP2X : txtY(1) = txtP2Y : rdoP(1) = rdoP2
        txtX(2) = txtP3X : txtY(2) = txtP3Y : rdoP(2) = rdoP3
        txtX(3) = txtP4X : txtY(3) = txtP4Y : rdoP(3) = rdoP4
        txtX(4) = txtP5X : txtY(4) = txtP5Y : rdoP(4) = rdoP5
        rdoP1.Checked = True

        For Each s As String In SpecNames
            cboSpec.Items.Add(s)
        Next
        cboSpec.SelectedIndex = 0
    End Sub

    Private Sub cboSpec_SelectedIndexChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles cboSpec.SelectedIndexChanged
        LoadSpec()
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadSpec()
        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        Dim section As String = "POS_" & SpecNames(cboSpec.SelectedIndex)

        ' Load image
        Dim imgPath As String = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "ImagePath", "")
        txtImagePath.Text = imgPath
        SetImage(imgPath)

        ' Load coordinates
        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
            txtX(i).Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "X", "0")
            txtY(i).Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "Y", "0")
        Next

        ' Circle size
        txtCircleSize.Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "CircleSize", "30")

        picPreview.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SetImage(imgPath As String)
        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
            currentImage.Dispose()
            currentImage = Nothing
        End If
        If System.IO.File.Exists(imgPath) Then
            currentImage = Image.FromFile(imgPath)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnSelectImage_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSelectImage.Click
        Using dlg As New OpenFileDialog()
            dlg.Filter = "Image Files|*.bmp;*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.gif|All Files|*.*"
            dlg.Title = "Select Image File"
            If dlg.ShowDialog() = DialogResult.OK Then
                txtImagePath.Text = dlg.FileName
                SetImage(dlg.FileName)
                picPreview.Invalidate()
            End If
        End Using
    End Sub

    ' Image click: set selected P coordinate, then auto-move to next P
    Private Sub picPreview_MouseClick(sender As Object, e As MouseEventArgs) Handles picPreview.MouseClick
        If currentImage Is Nothing Then Return

        ' Convert picPreview screen coords to original image coords
        Dim imgX As Integer = CInt(e.X * currentImage.Width / picPreview.Width)
        Dim imgY As Integer = CInt(e.Y * currentImage.Height / picPreview.Height)

        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
            If rdoP(i).Checked Then
                txtX(i).Text = imgX.ToString()
                txtY(i).Text = imgY.ToString()
                ' Auto-move to next P
                If i < 4 Then rdoP(i + 1).Checked = True
                Exit For
            End If
        Next

        picPreview.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    Private Sub picPreview_Paint(sender As Object, e As PaintEventArgs) Handles picPreview.Paint
        Dim g As Graphics = e.Graphics

        ' Draw image (StretchImage)
        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
            g.DrawImage(currentImage, picPreview.ClientRectangle)
        End If

        ' Circle size / font size (auto-scale proportionally)
        Dim circleSize As Integer = 30
        Integer.TryParse(txtCircleSize.Text, circleSize)
        If circleSize < 10 Then circleSize = 10
        Dim fontSize As Single = Math.Max(6, circleSize * 0.4F)

        ' Original image to screen scale
        Dim scaleX As Single = 1.0F
        Dim scaleY As Single = 1.0F
        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
            scaleX = CSng(picPreview.Width) / currentImage.Width
            scaleY = CSng(picPreview.Height) / currentImage.Height
        End If

        Using brushBlack As New SolidBrush(Color.Black)
            Using brushWhite As New SolidBrush(Color.White)
                Using penWhite As New Pen(Color.White, 1)
                    Using fnt As New Font("Arial", fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
                        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
                            Dim px As Integer = 0
                            Dim py As Integer = 0
                            Integer.TryParse(txtX(i).Text, px)
                            Integer.TryParse(txtY(i).Text, py)

                            Dim sx As Integer = CInt(px * scaleX)
                            Dim sy As Integer = CInt(py * scaleY)

                            Dim rect As New Rectangle(sx - circleSize \ 2, sy - circleSize \ 2, circleSize, circleSize)
                            g.FillEllipse(brushBlack, rect)
                            g.DrawEllipse(penWhite, rect)

                            Dim numStr As String = CStr(i + 1)
                            Dim strSize As SizeF = g.MeasureString(numStr, fnt)
                            g.DrawString(numStr, fnt, brushWhite,
                    sx - strSize.Width / 2,
                    sy - strSize.Height / 2)
                        Next
                    End Using
                End Using
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSave.Click
        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        Dim section As String = "POS_" & SpecNames(cboSpec.SelectedIndex)

        iniFile.WriteValue(section, "ImagePath", txtImagePath.Text)
        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
            iniFile.WriteValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "X", txtX(i).Text)
            iniFile.WriteValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "Y", txtY(i).Text)
        Next
        iniFile.WriteValue(section, "CircleSize", txtCircleSize.Text)

        MessageBox.Show("Saved successfully.", "Info", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnClose.Click
        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then currentImage.Dispose()
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    ' Real-time preview refresh on coordinate/circle size change
    Private Sub txtCoord_TextChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) _
        Handles txtP1X.TextChanged, txtP1Y.TextChanged,
                txtP2X.TextChanged, txtP2Y.TextChanged,
                txtP3X.TextChanged, txtP3Y.TextChanged,
                txtP4X.TextChanged, txtP4Y.TextChanged,
                txtP5X.TextChanged, txtP5Y.TextChanged,
                txtCircleSize.TextChanged
        picPreview.Invalidate()
    End Sub

End Class

content.text:
완료. 두 파일을 S50에서 ST40으로 복사 생성했습니다.

- `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmToolPos.vb`
- `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmToolPos.Designer.vb`

변경 사항:
- 코드 주석만 한국어에서 영어로 변경 (CLAUDE.md 규칙)
- SpecNames 8개 동일 유지: HGT_LH_KY, HGT_LH_QY, HGT_RH_KY, HGT_RH_QY, NHGT_LH_KY, NHGT_LH_QY, NHGT_RH_KY, NHGT_RH_QY
- INI section prefix `"POS_"` 동일 유지
- RootNamespace S50 동일 (네임스페이스 변경 불필요)
- `FrmToolPos.resx`는 이미 ST40 폴더에 존재
